name: Greek Cheese Pies (Tiropita)

ingredients.item: A quarter cup of Greek feta cheese
A quarter cup of Philadelphia cheese
One pack of organic phyllo sheets
One sprig of fresh thyme leaves
A pinch of freshly crushed black pepper

method: Add the butter into the pan and melt it.
Add the sesame seeds, eggs, salt, and pepper into the pan.
Cook the eggs well, and then add the thyme into the pan.
Cook the dish for two to three minutes and then dish out.
Add the milk, Philadelphia cheese, Greek feta cheese, and gruyere
cheese when the mixture cools down.
Cut the phyllo sheets in the desired shape and add the above mixture
Place the pies on a greased baking tray.
Place the baking tray in a preheated oven.
Bake the pies for about forty-five to fifty minutes.
Dish out the pies when they attain a golden brown color.
The dish is ready to be served.
